source_jobs.title: Head of Sales
source_jobs.description:
Position: Head of Sales





Who is Automat?

Automat was founded by a diverse group of creative technologists from teams like Google's Creative Lab, and Samsung’s innovation Think Tank Team. We envision a future where intelligent agents streamline business operations -- and one day, run their own enterprises. We’re redefining Enterprise AI Agents (Robotic Process Automation) and Intelligent Document Processing (IDP), developing the necessary tooling and infrastructure to incorporate the advancements of AI into practical, real-world applications.

We value curiosity, collaboration, and impact above rigid requirements. If you’re excited about AI and automation, thrive in flexible, creative environments, and want to work on meaningful, pioneering projects -- this role is for you.


The Role

We’re looking for a hands-on sales leader who thrives at the intersection of product, customer, and technical narrative. You’ll work closely with our CEO and founding team to shape our go-to-market strategy, run high-conviction experiments, and bring our AI products into the hands of real customers at an enterprise scale. This is not a pure management role -- you’ll be in the trenches helping close deals, distill technical value into business outcomes, and lay the foundation for a scalable, product-centric sales motion.

You’ll also work alongside engineers and designers to translate user needs into product priorities, develop repeatable playbooks, and tell the story of what Automat unlocks for the enterprise.



What You’ll Do:

 - Lead early sales efforts across both product-led and outbound/inbound motions

 - Partner with the CEO and CTO on customer targeting, deal execution, and revenue strategy

 - Lead the full sales cycle -- from mapping use cases to demoing product to closing contracts

 - Translate complex product functionality and AI infrastructure into compelling narratives for technical and non-technical stakeholders

 - Build internal tooling, templates, and playbooks to make GTM efforts more scalable

 - Feed insights from customer conversations back into product, engineering, and design



What Drives You:

 - You’re a builder at heart -- energized by creating systems, not inheriting them

 - You want to get deep into the product and understand how it works under the hood

 - You believe the best sales strategy starts with understanding real problems

 - You’re comfortable with ambiguity, fast feedback loops, and wearing multiple hats

 - You love figuring out what makes technical buyers tick -- and earning their trust
   

What’s in Your Toolbox:

 - Strong technical fluency -- you’ve sold technical products to data teams, operators, or engineers and can hold your own in a room full of builders

 - Experience selling complex B2B software, ideally at an early-stage startup or within an emerging tech category (AI, ML, automation, etc.)

 - Ability to design and execute outbound strategies as well as manage inbound and product-led pipelines (ability to build out territory plans, top of funnel strategy)

 - A knack for demoing and storytelling -- you can walk someone through a workflow and connect it to business value in seconds

 - Familiarity with the AI ecosystem (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, vector DBs, LLMOps) is a strong plus

 - Comfortable using modern GTM tools and experimenting with automation and AI in your own workflow
   

What We’re Looking For:

 - Clear, thoughtful communicator who can talk to engineers, operators, and execs alike

 - High-agency operator who’s comfortable iterating and improvising in public

 - Passion for AI, automation, and building things that make people’s jobs easier

 - Experience navigating high-velocity sales cycles and complex enterprise deals

 - 4–8+ years of experience in B2B sales, ideally with 2–5 years in a player/coach or management capacity

 - Previous experience in startups or dynamic, high-growth environments

source_jobs.title: Founding Designer
source_jobs.description:
FOUNDING DESIGNER






WHO IS AUTOMAT?

Automat was founded by a diverse group of creative technologists from teams like Google Creative Lab and Google Robotics at X.


Now, we’re building Automat - the simplest way for companies to create AI agents that take on repetitive, tedious tasks — from navigating complex user interfaces to reading and processing documents. Our technology helps some of the world’s largest companies streamline their operations, and they pay us a lot of money. We’re scaling quickly and need your help.



We believe that building automations will be as simple as showing a coworker an workflow to automate: Imagine a skillful automation developer sitting over your shoulder, turning your most boring workflows into reliable, deterministic automations that execute in seconds. Come help us build this.



Practically - we're redefining Enterprise AI Agents RPA (Robotic Process Automation) and Intelligent Document Processing (IDP), developing the necessary tooling and infrastructure to incorporate the advancements of AI into practical, real-world applications.




THE ROLE

We’re looking for a designer who will play a critical role in designing Automat’s platform and creating a brand language through every surface of the Automat experience. You’ll work directly with our co-founder CEO, Lucas Ochoa and need to have better design taste than he. (did he write this, he may have yes) The ideal candidate will have deep technical skill in design and an appreciation for excellent engineering. Ideally you’ve previously combined both in order to build brilliant products experiences and materials that are balanced, efficient, and work perfectly in their time and context. We’re trying to find the 2025 software equivalent of the mid century designers Plywood. If this sounds interesting, please help us do that.




YOU’RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU…

 - Have great taste

 - Can solve ambiguous problem spaces through making

 - You’ve thought about apple products a lot - and say 99 No’s for every Yes

 - have prior experience in a fast-moving, high-growth setting

 - Have taken experiences end to end: from concept to production

 - are inspired by the new creative possibilities that AI interactions enable and are eager to invent.

 - On occasion clean the metaphorical toilet
   https://youtu.be/oP45EdNznOY?feature=shared&t=200

Likely Behaviors:

 - Dream in Figma auto layout

 - You’re “vibe-coding” prototypes for your design ideas

 - Are visually and therefore viscerally offended when you see poorly spaced type or an improperly nested corner radius

 - Are meticulous about keeping your design portfolio up to date (only kidding)




BONUSES

 - You care about good writing

 - Have received some awards for your incredible product / design work

 - You’ve coded full stack apps on your own before

 - Know how to use Git

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer (Junior/Intermediate)
source_jobs.description:
What is Automat?



Automat was founded by a diverse group of creative technologists from teams like Google Creative Lab, and Samsung’s innovation Think Tank Team. We envision a future where intelligent agents streamline business operations - and one day, run their own enterprises. We're redefining Enterprise Agentic Process Automation and Intelligent Document Processing to replace bulky and expensive Legacy RPA (Robotic Process Automation) solutions by developing the necessary tooling and infrastructure to incorporate the advancements of AI into practical, real-world applications.



We value creativity, pragmatism, collaboration, and impact above rigid requirements. If you're excited about AI Agents and automation, thrive in flexible, creative environments, and want to work on meaningful, pioneering projects alongside experienced entrepreneurs - this role is for you.



We encourage anyone to apply - we think talent, passion and your unique perspective can outweigh years of experience. We are really looking for someone who can hit the ground running on day one and contribute at a rapid pace, while also being someone from whom we ourselves can learn from.



The Role



We're looking for product minded Full Stack Engineers with high potential who want to take their craft to the next level. We’re a small talented senior team who can do more with less, and are looking for folks who want to build key portions of our product offering alongside us. You’ll have the opportunity to actively influence product direction, and contribute meaningfully to all aspects of our engineering culture while learning from highly experienced engineer mentors.



In this role, you'll collaborate closely with staff level engineers to build scalable and robust core product infrastructure for our customers. You’re perfect for this role if you've demonstrated your capabilities as a software engineer by working on real world products, and are ready to take the next step in your career at a fast paced AI first startup. We want to give you full ownership and agency.



What You'll Do:



 - Work within our Core Engineering team to develop and expand our product suite, from our Enterprise grade Automat Studio, to our state of the art Agentic Workflow Builder and beyond.

 - Build interfaces which leverage cutting-edge computer use models to automate and accelerate real world Enterprise workflows across finance, banking, healthcare, e-commerce, and more.

 - Collaborate with our Forward Deployed Team to understand how customers interact with Automat’s platform today, and use those learnings to bolster our Agentic Workflow Builder and Developer Toolkit.

 - Develop beautiful and intuitive UX interfaces which abstract away complex business automation processes and create a seamless experience for non-technical users and engineers alike

 - Create robust, enterprise grade back-end infrastructure and services to power our Fortune 500 customers' workflows at scale

 - Influence our engineering practices, shape product direction, and contribute to building a world class company culture.
   
   

What drives you



 - Curiosity and momentum — you love learning quickly, trying new tools, and improving your craft week over week. You're excited about the AI age and want to be at its forefront

 - Building with others — you thrive on fast feedback loops, pairing, and collaborating with designers/PMs/engineers to ship real user value

 - Excitement about AI-assisted development — you use AI tools to move faster, but you verify outputs, write tests, and check edge cases

 - Making complex things feel simple — you care deeply about polish, clarity, and turning messy workflows into delightful user experiences



What’s in your toolbox



 - Fullstack fundamentals — you’ve shipped production features across frontend + backend, and you understand APIs, databases, auth, and deployment

 - Strong product/engineering judgment — you know when to ship a scrappy v0, and when to slo

source_jobs.title: Applied AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Who are the people that make up Automat?

Automat was founded by a diverse group of creative technologists from teams like Google Creative Lab, and Samsung’s innovation Think Tank Team. We envision a future where intelligent agents streamline business operations — and one day, run their own enterprises. We're redefining Enterprise AI Agents (Robotic Process Automation) and Intelligent Document Processing (IDP), developing the necessary tooling and infrastructure to incorporate the advancements of AI into practical, real-world applications.

We value curiosity, collaboration, and impact above rigid requirements. If you're excited about AI and automation, thrive in flexible, creative environments, and want to work on meaningful, pioneering projects—this role is for you.

We encourage anyone to apply - while this is a senior position we think talent, passion and your unique perspective can outweigh years of experience. We are really looking for someone who can hit the ground running on day one and contribute at a rapid pace, while also being someone from whom we ourselves can learn from.


The Role

We're looking for an Applied AI Engineer who thrives at the intersection of product, engineering, and research. In this role, you'll collaborate closely with forward-deployed engineers and end users, developing innovative tools for both internal teams and external customers. You will actively shape technical solutions, influence strategic direction, and contribute meaningfully to our culture.


What You'll Do:

 - Collaborate with product and engineering to deeply understand customer challenges

 - Research and deploy real-world applications of cutting-edge AI models

 - Design and implement impactful solutions across internal tools and customer-facing products

 - Influence our engineering practices, shape product direction, and contribute to company culture
   

What drives you

 - Curiosity, creativity, and a drive to rapidly learn and adapt

 - Building full-stack apps that bring AI to life

 - Staying on top of the latest in AI and LLM prompting techniques

 - Pushing the boundaries of what's possible with AI agents

 - Working in fast-moving, collaborative teams
   

What’s in your toolbox

 - Strong understanding of ML & AI best practices

 - Proficiency in Python and Typescript

 - Experience working with LLM APIs (e.g. OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, etc.)

 - Knowledge of LLM frameworks like Vercel AI SDK

 - Experience building with frameworks like Next.js and working with REST APIs

 - Familiarity with “computer-use” models (e.g., Operator, Computer Use, Browser Use)

 - Experience using AI tools effectively (e.g. Cursor, Windsurf, lovable, etc.)
   

What we are looking for

 - Ability to rapidly prototype and iterate on ideas

 - Excellent communication and collaboration skills

 - Comfortable navigating ambiguity and wearing multiple hats

 - Passion for creating intuitive, user-friendly experiences

 - A proactive mindset and a bias toward action

 - Experience in startups or other dynamic, high-growth settingsExperience in startups or other dynamic, high-growth settings

 - 3-6+ years of experience working as an IC collaborative teams

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive (Full Cycle)
source_jobs.description:
JOB DESCRIPTION – ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE (ENTERPRISE SALES)






About Automat: Automat is transforming enterprise operations through AI-driven automation. Backed by leading investors including Y Combinator, Initialized Capital, and Khosla Ventures, we’ve quickly become the automation partner of choice for Fortune 500 insurers, major healthcare providers, and innovative fintech companies. Automat’s generative AI platform empowers enterprises to automate complex processes faster, smarter, and at a significantly lower cost than traditional solutions—unlocking new efficiencies with AI that learns and adapts.



The Role: We are seeking a driven Enterprise Account Executive to spearhead enterprise sales within Insurance, Banking, and Lending sectors. In this high-impact role, you’ll own the complete sales cycle—from strategic outreach and consultative selling to closing enterprise-scale agreements. Reporting directly to our CEO, you'll have autonomy and influence as you build deep relationships with C-level executives, positioning Automat as the essential partner for enterprise automation and AI adoption.




Key Responsibilities:

 - Enterprise Sales Leadership: Lead end-to-end sales engagements, closing significant enterprise deals in financial services and insurance.

 - Consultative Approach: Understand and articulate customer pain points, clearly demonstrating how Automat’s generative AI platform can provide transformative operational benefits.

 - Complex Sales Cycle Management: Effectively manage and navigate lengthy enterprise sales cycles (6-12+ months), building broad organizational buy-in.

 - Pipeline Management: Build and sustain a robust sales pipeline, providing accurate forecasting and strategic deal progression.

 - Cross-Team Collaboration: Work closely with Automat’s leadership and technical teams to ensure alignment on customer solutions and market feedback.

 - Industry Evangelism: Stay ahead of industry trends, establishing yourself and Automat as trusted thought leaders in intelligent automation.
   
   

Requirements:

 - 5+ years proven experience in enterprise SaaS sales, preferably in automation, AI, or related technology.

 - Demonstrated track record closing substantial enterprise deals ($500K+) within Insurance, Banking, or Financial Services.

 - Strong consultative selling skills with an ability to simplify complex technical concepts for senior executives.

 - Self-driven and entrepreneurial mindset; comfortable working autonomously in a dynamic startup environment.

 - Exceptional relationship-building and negotiation skills with C-level stakeholders.
   
   

Why Join Automat: Join a dynamic, early-stage startup positioned at the forefront of generative AI-driven automation. You'll play a pivotal role in accelerating our growth trajectory, collaborating closely with visionary enterprise clients, and shaping the future of intelligent automation. Automat offers competitive compensation, equity, and the opportunity to profoundly impact the automation landscape.

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
SDR @ AUTOMAT:



Automat AI is hiring a Sales Development Representative to join our fast-growing team. As an SDR, you will help generate new business and expand current customer accounts.

You'll be the voice of Automat to potential customers, contributing to our mission of making the simplest, most affordable tool for businesses to automate their work.

Traditional automation software is slow and expensive, so we built Automat. We use AI to make building automations 10X faster and 1/10th the price. It lets companies automate their work without a massive team or budget.



WE HAVE THE PLEASURE OF COLLABORATING WITH A WIDE VARIETY OF COMPANIES, INCLUDING LARGE ENTERPRISES AND SMALL BUSINESSES, TO CREATE AUTOMATIONS. THIS PRESENTS AN EXCITING OPPORTUNITY FOR INDIVIDUALS WITH AN ENTREPRENEURIAL SPIRIT WHO THRIVE ON INTERACTING WITH CUSTOMERS AND ASPIRE TO MAKE A MEANINGFUL IMPACT AT A RAPIDLY GROWING STARTUP.


WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Drive full sales cycle, including prospecting, follow-ups, and closing deals.

 - Represent Automat professionally and develop relationships with existing and new clients.

 - Conduct sales presentations to cultivate customer relationships and drive long-term account growth.

 - Plan and execute sales strategy, provide forward-looking analysis, and contribute to document creation.

 - Provide feedback on customer/prospect needs, industry trends, and market intelligence.

 - Achieve sales quota and maintain a healthy pipeline through cold emailing and calling target accounts.


WHO YOU ARE:

 - Have closed deals and ran full sales cycles

 - 1+ years of outbound SDR/BDR experience

 - 1+ years of Account Executive closing experience

 - Previous experience in enterprise software sales (ideally AI-related)

 - Worked in an organization with a defined sales process

 - Highly curious and eager to learn

 - Passionate about AI agents, technological advancements, and their real-world applications.

 - Strong English communication skills

 - Bonus: Bilingual


ABOUT THE INTERVIEW

Interview Process: At Automat, we're looking for SDRs who are truly passionate about bringing state-of-the-art AI research into the hands of our customers. You'll work closely with a highly technical team of engineers to understand our product and technology and will ultimately be responsible for building new relationships with customers.

Our interview process is designed to find SDRs that can empathize with customer needs, present Automat well, extend its brand through its own communication, and help bring new deals to a closing state like clockwork.

notes: AI-driven automation company with a mix of tech and sales roles
